item.title: Incoming medical students walk out at University of Michigan’s white coat ceremony as the keynote speaker is openly anti-abortion.

item.title: If this makes it out of usersub I'll go down...
item.description:
I'm cleaning a vacant, very old shop.. Update for you heathens.. I need a coffee https://imgur.com/gallery/I2aGnc0
It's so freakin dark I can't see the end of the stairs. And the bloody light doesn't work. **My first time on the front page! Send something to cure the spook please**

item.title: At this point I think I’m beyond trying.
item.description: For the first 10 years of our marriage, my ex was abusing drugs. I found out, and she began blaming her own ex, who she claimed was an abusive partner. She made up an elaborate history, and while I’ll give her the Oscar for being a good liar, I knew her story didn’t make sense. But it served its purpose, and I generally believed she used drugs because her ex had been abusive. I insisted she stop using drugs for our children’s sake. She promised she would, and told me she’d gone to our doctor for therapy. I kept catching her high. My own brother was an addict, so I knew. Each time she blamed her ex, and promised she was getting help. At this time, my doctor began acting different to me, which should have been a warning, but I’m not a magician. Eventually, we broke up. The doctor stated she was clean, and our children should go with her. I had to agree, having no choice. About 10 years ago, she dropped the kids off, and had a flat tire. I offered to change it, and unloaded her trunk to get the jack and spare. I found a bag of pills and some kind of powder. She immediately denied it was hers, blaming someone from her work. This was the last straw, it was too stupid to take seriously. I told her that was it, I would never believe a thing she ever said again. I didn’t know what to do, because I know she would tell the cops I planted the drugs, and they’d believe her because she’s such a good liar. My kids were nearly grown, too, so I believed time would let me explain to them. Fast forward 10 years. Today my daughter was here, and the subject of why my other daughter will not visit came up. She screamed at me about being an abusive partner, using the exact words my ex had used against her own ex. I didn’t take long to figure out she’d been hiding behind the same lie, in order to distract people so she can take drugs, since when she went for “therapy” with the doctor. So long as she kept up the lie, she got sympathy, and instant discredit whenever I warned people not to trust her. She also spent the entire time poisoning my kids against me, and now they will never speak to me again. I’d been told the whole time that time would work things out, that my children would come around, and right now I don’t think that’s true. I can’t talk to anyone in my life about it, because even my mother believed my ex. I just wanted to vent. I’m not looking for points or sympathy. Maybe even to let other people whose kids were poisoned by vindictive exes they’re not alone. I have my faith, and I won’t spend my last years in the street, but being robbed of grandchildren, and to have nearly every single person I know believe I’m a scumbag hurt. So that’s my vent. If you hear gossip, and someone is telling you s**t about someone you don’t need to know, be careful. If her lies come back to haunt her, a lot of people will look like fools. Don’t let yourself be one of them in your life.
item.dc:creator: HuigGrotius

item.title: Father Rod Bower and the Gosford Anglican Church Sign
item.description: Some christians get it. Gosford, New South Wales, Australia. TL;DR : Jesus said, "Do to others whatever you would like them to do to you." “Just keep asking yourself: What would Jesus not do?” Chuck Palahniuk Disclosure: I am not a christian. However, if you are I encourage you to re-read Jesus' words. He did not say judge, discriminate against and persecute non-Christians. He did not say keep weapons in your house. He did not say please f*** up the environment. According to your bible, he did say: "Do not judge, or you too will be judged. For in the same way you judge others, you will be judged, and with the measure you use, it will be measured to you. Why do you look at the speck of sawdust in your brother's eye and pay no attention to the plank in your own eye?" Matthew 7:1-3 “He that is without sin among you, let him cast the first stone.” John 8:3 “Love your enemies! Pray for those who persecute you! In that way, you will be acting as true children of your Father in heaven. For he gives his sunlight to both the evil and the good, and he sends rain on the just and the unjust alike.” Matthew 5:43-47 “Let the little children come to me, and do not hinder them, for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these.” Matthew 19:14 “Love your neighbor as yourself." Matthew 22:39 “Do to others whatever you would like them to do to you. This is the essence of all that is taught in the law and the prophets.” Matthew 7:12 FP edit: Thanks! Please be nice to someone today. They need it. Please vote out people who hate. Please vote out people who are destroying the Earth. Hugs.
item.dc:creator: cryborg

item.title: Tiny rescued fart squirrel
item.description: There is some piano music, but there is also some cute skunk sounds. I figured on balance, the sounds are worth it
item.dc:creator: GorgeousGeorgieous
